context.title: Sustainability reporting project recovery
context.description: The workstream lost momentum after conflicting stakeholder feedback and a missed internal checkpoint.

trigger.summary: Conflicting feedback changed the expected deliverable after the checkpoint was missed.

impact.description: The publication timeline moved and ownership became unclear.

items.label: Limited review window
items.notes: The external review window cannot be extended.

available.label: Decision log
available.notes: Can centralize decisions and unresolved assumptions.

actions.title: Clarify the next decision owner
actions.expected_effect: A single decision owner is named.
actions.reassessment_trigger: Decision owner remains unclear after 24 hours

actions.title: Break the work into a 48-hour recovery task
actions.expected_effect: The work is reduced to one reviewable increment.
actions.reassessment_trigger: The 48-hour task cannot be completed within available capacity

response.current_strategy: Reduce scope to the decision needed for the next checkpoint.

assumptions: The final decision owner was understood by everyone.
adaptations: Record the decision owner before the next review cycle.
learning.what_happened: Conflicting review channels changed the deliverable after the checkpoint.
learning.what_was_expected: One decision owner would consolidate feedback before review.
learning.what_changed: Feedback arrived through separate channels and the decision owner was not explicit.
what_was_learned: Decision ownership must be visible before review begins.
repeat: Use a single shared decision log.
redesign: Require one named decision owner before the review window opens.
uncertainties: Whether all reviewers can use the same feedback channel.

actions.title: Document unresolved assumptions
actions.expected_effect: Unresolved assumptions are visible before review.

actions.title: Schedule a short stakeholder review
actions.expected_effect: Stakeholders confirm one scope and next decision.
actions.reassessment_trigger: Required reviewers are unavailable by the checkpoint

next_steps.success_signal: One decision owner, one approved scope, and a dated next checkpoint.
next_steps.scope_decision_notes: Limit recovery work to the decision and evidence needed for the next checkpoint.
blockers: External reviewer availability may constrain the checkpoint.
escalation_log: Escalate unresolved decision ownership to the program sponsor after 24 hours.
next_steps.reassessment_trigger: Reassess at the checkpoint or sooner if the approval dependency changes.
